38948.title: Click
38948.description: The programme for everyone interested in the Internet and new media. Whether it's e-commerce, new developments and products, or gadgets and games, Click looks at the tools that will revolutionise business and personal life.

38991.title: Click
38991.description: Spencer Kelly takes a high speed ride with Sam Schmidt a former Indycar racer, paralysed in a crash who has developed technology which allows him to race once more.

39148.title: Click
39148.description: Click hits the racetrack to meet a motorsport team with a difference. Team Brit is made up of six disabled drivers using bespoke, specially adapted cars to compete in races against non-disabled drivers on a level playing field. And Spencer takes a high-speed ride with Sam Schmidt, a former Indycar racer, paralysed in a crash, who has developed technology which allows him to race again.
